messages.content: 这句话有语病吗：within the \name\ framework, we use Qwen3-VL-235B as backbone to score trajectories and provide reward signals.

有一点小语病/不够地道，主要在两处：

1) **“as backbone”** 前通常要加冠词：**as a backbone / as the backbone**。更常见写法是 **as the backbone model**。  
2) **“score trajectories”** 可以，但更自然的是 **score (the) trajectories** 或 **evaluate trajectories**。  
3) “provide reward signals” 没问题；若想更贴近RL表述可用 **generate reward signals**。

更推荐的改法（择一）：

- **Within the \name\ framework, we use Qwen3-VL-235B as the backbone model to score trajectories and generate reward signals.**  
- **Within the \name\ framework, we use Qwen3-VL-235B as a backbone model for trajectory scoring and reward generation.**  
- **In the \name\ framework, Qwen3-VL-235B serves as the backbone model for trajectory evaluation and reward signaling.**
